段片說Popo無warning就開槍

琴晚整咗張文宣圖，跟手整咗個petition希望有人會幫手推
[拯救港人，刻不容緩]
**請立刻聯署請求美國國會考慮延長或給予港人永久居留權**

https://petitions.whitehouse.gov/petition/grant-permanent-residence-hong-kong-citizens-who-will-be-america-and-territories-specific-period-time?fbclid=IwAR2vZH42F4Nxu60Zr0gEwTxiGo6Wn1LDIKIpKm-g7KQtcVYfR0Qt0ctlHrQ

《1992年中國學生保護法案》(Chinese Student Protection Act of 1992)是一項六四事件後由美國國會通過的暫時法案，旨在給予限期內抵達美國的中國國民永久居留權的法案。法案提倡者正是致力推動《香港人權與民主法案》的現任眾議院院長佩洛西(Nancy Pelosi)。

鑒於現時香港政府對在港異見人士威脅日益嚴重，港人現正懇求國際社會施以援手。現請各位立即聯署，請求美國國會考慮提出類於CSPA的人道法案，旨在延長，甚至給予只持有有效香港特區護照或英國國民(海外)護照的香港居民永久居留權。

[救手足]佩洛西:可向港被捕人士發美國綠卡 提供人道支援

- 分享自 LIHKG 討論區

https://www.icrc.org/en/doc/assets/files/other/icrc-002-0809.pdf
INTERNATIONAL RULES AND STANDARDS FOR POLICING
Law enforcement officials are required to identify themselves as such and to issue a warning before resorting to the use of firearms (BPUFF No. 10), unless such warning would create too high a risk, be inappropriate or pointless. The addressee should be given sufficient time to respond to the warning.

https://www.policinglaw.info/international-standards
SPECIFIC RULES ON THE USE OF FIREARMS
1. A law enforcement official may only discharge a firearm when it is necessary in the circumstances to do so to stop an imminent threat of loss of life or serious injury. An imminent threat is one that is expected to materialise in actual harm in a split second or at most a matter of seconds.

2. Where a threat to life is grave and proximate in time, but not imminent, exceptionally a firearm may be discharged when it is necessary in the circumstances to do so to stop that threat.

3. A threat purely to property does not justify the use of firearms under international law.

4. Intentional lethal use of firearms can only be lawful when such use is strictly unavoidable to protect life. A threat to life that is not imminent can never justify shooting with intent to kill.

要記住極權如何打壓香港示威：
1.抹黑：利用少部分的暴力衝突而將全部示威者形容為「邪惡」、示威=港獨、新華社、環球時報、人民日報
2.誤導：送中條例、說謊、黃色object等等
3.滲透：5毛、陳雲、黃x民、譚香文
4.假民意/曲解民意：主流民意是......
5.5毛輿論-分化、負面、fake news、煽動手足做負效益/低效益工作
6.強迫企業自我審查
7.出動黑社會、愛國暴徒
8.扮示威者：(負面的)破壞eg.遊行
9.嫁禍示威者：打議員打記者打女仔
10.扮好人/扮對話：「江山易改本性難移」
11.警察濫權、濫捕、暴力執法、恐嚇
12.利用親中人士發表「假」權威言論
諗到再加
